title: King's Opposition Mate
setup: Your kings stand in **opposition** on the d-file — the perfect cage for a queen to seal.
hint: Slide the queen along the back rank — your king already covers {{c7}}, {{d7}} and {{e7}}.
explanation:
## The Idea

This is the bedrock **K+Q vs K mate**. The two kings face off in opposition, and the queen swings around to mate on the back rank.

Play {{Qa8#}}.

Why is the king stuck?

- {{c8}} and {{e8}} — covered by the queen on a8 (8th rank)
- {{c7}}, {{d7}}, {{e7}} — all controlled by your own king on **d6**
- The queen is far away, and nothing can block on the empty 8th rank

> **Takeaway:** When converting a queen-and-king endgame, place your king *one square diagonally* from the enemy king (opposition + a knight's move) and let the queen rake the back rank. Always double-check for stalemate before committing.
